authors: Jonas C. L. Valente Renata de Oliveira Miranda Gomes Fernando Oliveira Paulino a Oxford Internet Institute
raw_title: Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025
title_en: Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025
title_zh: 通过监管平衡平台权力的努力：2019年至2025年巴西的在线新闻法案与平台依赖解绑立法倡议
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了巴西在2019年至2025年间如何通过立法来减少新闻媒体对大型数字平台的依赖，并平衡平台权力。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how Brazil has used legislation from 2019 to 2025 to reduce news media dependency on large digital platforms and balance platform power.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字平台监管与新闻媒体独立性之间的立法互动，特别是在新兴市场国家的政策制定。
research_direction_en: Investigating legislative interactions between digital platform regulation and news media independence, particularly in emerging market policy-making contexts.
